title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
author: openai-blog
raw_description: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.
summary: OpenAI推出三门Academy课程，帮助用户构建实用AI技能、创建可重复工作流，并在日常工作中应用AI代理。
analysis_note: 内容为AI应用培训课程，技术深度一般，但具有实用价值，评分中等。
